name: onchain_report
description: 2-in-1 on-chain report. Pass a contract address to get a Trust Due Diligence report (trust score, risk level, breakdown, recent community reviews). Pass a wallet address to get a Wallet Reputation Profile (trust level, reputation score, Scarab balance, interaction history, reviews written). Automatically detects contract vs wallet.

address.description: Contract address for Trust Due Diligence, or wallet address for Reputation Profile

wallet_address.description: Your connected wallet address (optional — unlocks full breakdown vs summary)

onChainData.description: Contract: { name, category, trustScore, riskLevel, breakdown, recentReviews } | Wallet: { trustLevel, reputationScore, scarabBalance, totalReviews, totalUpvotes, recentReviews }
